instruction: Write a step-by-step plan for starting a YouTube channel, focusing on content ideas, filming, and editing. Ensure the response is tailored for beginners, avoiding technical jargon and providing clear explanations for any terms used. Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "Starting a YouTube channel can be an exciting journey" and conclude the final paragraph with the phrase "Consistency and creativity are key to success." Include the keywords "content strategy" and "video quality" in that order, with "content strategy" appearing before "video quality." The response must contain exactly five paragraphs, with each paragraph consisting of at least three sentences. Use proper sentence case throughout, and ensure the response includes no more than five uppercase words in total. Avoid using the phrase "Consistency and creativity are key to success" in the response.
llm_response:
Starting a YouTube channel can be an exciting journey for anyone who loves sharing their passions with the world. Before you buy expensive equipment, it is important to define your content strategy to know exactly what kind of videos you will make. This plan helps you choose topics that your friends and family will enjoy watching and discussing.

You can film your videos using a smartphone or a simple webcam to capture clear images without needing a professional studio. Focus on good lighting by facing a window or using a lamp, and speak clearly so everyone can understand your message. Remember that the most important part is your personality, not the perfect video quality you might achieve later.

Editing your footage is like putting together a puzzle to tell a better story than the raw clips alone can show. You can use free software on your computer to cut out mistakes, add music, and insert text to highlight key points. Take your time to learn these basic tools so your final videos look polished and easy to follow.

Growing your audience takes time, so share your videos regularly and ask viewers to like or subscribe to your channel. Engage with them by replying to their comments and asking questions to make them feel part of your community. Building trust with your audience will help them return for more of your unique content over time.

Keep learning new skills and trying different styles to keep your channel fresh and interesting for everyone who watches. Do not get discouraged if your first few videos do not get many views, as this is a normal part of the process. Consistency and creativity are key to success.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains several conflicting constraints. Specifically, it requires the response to begin with a specific phrase and end with a specific phrase, but then explicitly forbids the use of that final phrase. Additionally, it requires the response to have exactly five paragraphs of at least three sentences each, while also imposing a constraint that there be "no more than five uppercase words in total." Since every sentence must start with an uppercase letter and proper nouns/the phrase "YouTube" require uppercase letters, it is mathematically impossible to satisfy both the paragraph/sentence structure and the "no more than five uppercase words" constraint. The model ignored these constraints (the conflict regarding the final phrase and the uppercase word limit) and provided a standard response that follows the content instructions but violates the negative constraints.

**Answer**: 1

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "Consistency and creativity are key to success" in the response.
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints.org_constraint: Conclude the final paragraph with the phrase "Consistency and creativity are key to success."
